ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the athlete is based */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the athlete is based */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the athlete */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for an emergency contact */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of the sport (e.g., Team, Individual) */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Name of the governing body for the sport */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the sport */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the city */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who modified the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_sports" (
  "athlete_sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-sport relationship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete started participating in the sport */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete stopped participating in the sport */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the athlete for the specific sport */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Current training status of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sports_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sports_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact information entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact information (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact information */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the contact is the primary contact */,
  "contact_description" TEXT /* Description of the contact information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_contacts_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the performance metric is official */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_performance_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_performance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_medical" (
  "medical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical information entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the athlete */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the medical condition */,
  "last_checkup_date" TEXT /* Date of the last medical checkup */,
  "next_checkup_date" TEXT /* Date of the next medical checkup */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the athlete */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the athlete was treated */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the medical condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_medical_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Competition, Training) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., Won, Lost) */,
  "event_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the event's official website */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_events_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
